title: Metternich
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Metternich''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]. Along with the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Juvaini]]'', it attacked the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']] while the latter was receiving [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] prototypes during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWING">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
